title: What to Know About Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine’s Ousted Defense Minister
summary_full: Mr. Fedorov became the youthful face of Ukraine’s successful drone warfare program. The move to replace him has prompted street protests.
summary_public: Mr. Fedorov became the youthful face of Ukraine’s successful drone warfare program. The move to replace him has prompted street protests.
